title: Life Begins Anew
writer: Aldo De Benedetti, Mario Mattoli, Steno
actors: Alida Valli, Fosco Giachetti, Eduardo De Filippo
plot: Life Begins Anew (Italian: La vita ricomincia) is a 1945 Italian drama film directed by Mario Mattoli and starring Alida Valli, Fosco Giachetti and Eduardo De Filippo. It was the second most popular Italian film during 1945-46 aft...
